message:
[bd-3ihtb] Add PromptInjector timing and formatting unit tests

Add comprehensive tests for PromptInjector covering:
- Staggered delivery timing configuration
- Double-enter quirk handling for Codex and Gemini
- Review mode prompt content verification
- Test mode prompt content verification
- Default marching orders content
- Adaptive delay with different providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google)
- Enter delay configuration
- Batch result tracking
- Chained configuration methods

All tests include detailed [TEST] prefix logging for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
